description: Answer includes specific unsupported historical claims.
query: What happened during the 1913 Meridian Textile Strike?

retrieved_chunks.text: The Meridian Textile Strike began after mill workers protested a proposed wage reduction and changes to overtime rules.
The documents do not provide a final settlement date or the number of workers involved.

final_answer: The strike ended on April 18 after state police arrested twenty-seven picketers, and workers won a legally binding eight-hour day.

entries.text: The Meridian Textile Strike began after mill workers protested a proposed wage reduction and changes to overtime rules.
The documents do not provide a final settlement date or the number of workers involved.
